description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic jet ski with a streamlined red body and bold, angular contours. The vehicle features two prominent rear fins with white accents, giving it a dynamic, high-speed appearance. The cockpit is equipped with a tinted yellow windscreen and a black, ergonomic seat designed for a single rider. The handlebars are black with visible grips and control elements, and the side panels display the word 'AIRBOLT' in white. The undercarriage and side fairings are finished in a metallic gray, adding to the modern aesthetic. The overall design suggests a high-performance watercraft built for speed and agility.
description: A red, futuristic jet ski with rear fins, a tinted windscreen, and a single black seat, marked 'AIRBOLT' on the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual headlights, narrow nose, and the handlebar structure above the windscreen.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'AIRBOLT' branding, rear fins, and the full length of the seat and body.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the streamlined shape, central seat, and the symmetrical rear fins.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the seat, windscreen, and rear fins.
attribute_brand_logo: The word 'AIRBOLT' in white, stylized block letters, is visible on the left and right side panels near the rear of the vehicle.
attribute_handlebar_design: Black, straight handlebars with textured grips and visible control elements, mounted above the windscreen.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, elongated black seat with a contoured shape for one rider, integrated into the main body.
